tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
    edit "port3"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 3
next
    edit "port4"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 4
    next
    edit "port5"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 5
    next
    edit "port6"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 6
    next
    edit "port7"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 7
    next
    edit "port8"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
set snmp-index 8
    next
    edit "port9"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 9
    next
    edit "port10"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 10
    next
    edit "naf.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set src-check disable
        set snmp-index 11
    next
    edit "l2t.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set snmp-index 12
    next
    edit "ssl.root"
set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set alias "SSL VPN interface"
        set snmp-index 13
    next
    edit "fortilink"
        set vdom "root"
        set fortilink enable
        set ip 10.255.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set snmp-index 14
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
    edit "LAN_NET"
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "TARGET_7.0.14.254"
        set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
    next
end

config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "Deny_ICMP_LAN_to_WAN"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_NET"
        set dstaddr "TARGET_7.0.14.254"
        set action deny
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address
      set logtraffic all
    next
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
    edit "TARGET_7.0.14.254"
        set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
    next
end

config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "Deny_All_ICMP_LAN_to_WAN"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_NET"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action deny
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

show firewall address
show firewall policy"}

config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address
config firewall address
    edit "none"
        set uuid 857d5092-1611-51f1-625c-535de8633053
        set subnet 0.0.0.0 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "login.microsoftonline.com"
        set uuid 857d5ab0-1611-51f1-54ea-02a3a5cdc45a
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoftonline.com"
    next
    edit "login.microsoft.com"
        set uuid 857d5fe2-1611-51f1-62e9-bfc240da7b7b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoft.com"
    next
    edit "login.windows.net"
        set uuid 857d64b0-1611-51f1-65d8-26728a9f8a30
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "gmail.com"
        set uuid 857d6974-1611-51f1-b184-634e68fd8aac

        set fqdn "gmail.com"
next
    edit "wildcard.google.com"
        set uuid 857d6dc0-1611-51f1-6ca8-7cea31e68025

        set fqdn "*.google.com"
    next
    edit "wildcard.dropbox.com"
        set uuid 857d71ee-1611-51f1-71f7-4ba3d62d81e6
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.dropbox.com"
    next
    edit "all"
        set uuid 86593d96-1611-51f1-a70f-fb315689d0b4
    next
    edit "FIREWALL_AUTH_PORTAL_ADDRESS"
        set uuid 86593fb2-1611-51f1-9073-27812930fbd3
    next
    edit "FABRIC_DEVICE"
        set uuid 8659416a-1611-51f1-f065-70a3bb42c734
        set comment "IPv4 addresses of Fabric Devices."
    next
    edit "SSLVPN_TUNNEL_ADDR1"
        set uuid 865a078a-1611-51f1-8f5a-9a9144ce99b2
        set type iprange
set start-ip 10.212.134.200
        set end-ip 10.212.134.210
    next
    edit "LAN_subnet"
        set uuid a538b89e-1612-51f1-8a26-324c6b0b2242

    next
    edit "Caldera_Server"
        set uuid a53e5c36-1612-51f1-c16b-d575bf4264eb
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "FCTEMS_ALL_FORTICLOUD_SERVERS"

        set sub-type ems-tag
    next
    edit "LAN_NET"
        set uuid 3d54fe86-1e32-51f1-ec4b-dc901011c3fa
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "TARGET_7.0.14.254"
        set uuid 3d61e25e-1e32-51f1-180b-f17b743cd17a
        set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
    next
end

    edit 2
